1998. Prepublished version Published version ABSTRACT Electrical and computer engineering has undergone rapid change and will continue to do so for the foreseeable future. These changes will have a profound effect on ECE education. In this article,

rofound effect on ECE education. In this article, we describe some changes in the practice of engineering and speculate on the educational implications. Send comments to Edward A. Lee at eal at eecs berkeley edu .
